items.title: As prediction markets boom, questions arise over who will be the watchdog
items.description: As new contract types are introduced, prediction markets may have to work under two regulatory bodies.

items.title: Short sellers load up against SpaceX as stock drops below IPO price
items.description: About 185 million SpaceX shares are now sold short, representing roughly 29% of the company's publicly tradable float, according to S3.

items.title: Trump is set to deliver an election-focused national address tonight. Here's what to know
items.description: "Without free and fair elections, you don't have a country," Trump said this week when asked to preview the speech.

items.title: Sen. Warren says Trump's CFPB overhaul has cost Americans $26.5 billion
items.description: Sen. Elizabeth Warren says the Trump administration's rollback of CFPB rules and enforcement has cost Americans up to $26.5 billion so far.

items.title: Here's what to expect when Netflix reports earnings after the bell
items.description: Investors will be looking for updates on Netflix's ad-supported business, engagement metrics and how the streaming giant continues to consider potential M&A.

items.title: Nvidia unveils new AI model and expands Japan’s physical AI ecosystem
items.description: Nvidia announces new AI model, Cosmos 3 Edge, and expansion of its physical AI ecosystems in Japan.

items.title: U.S. grocery slowdown deepens as shoppers buy fewer items, raising pressure on food companies
items.description: New data shows sales declining, and the trend is forcing grocers and brands to compete harder on price and value.

items.title: Iran warns U.S. of Hormuz ‘red line,’ says it will retaliate if Trump carries out threats
items.description: Trump warned that the U.S. will target Iranian infrastructure next week if negotiations do not resume.

items.title: The best states for workers to get educated, trained and find a job in America in 2026
items.description: These 11 U.S. states excel when it comes to the education level of their workforce, migration patterns, and workforce development programs.

items.title: Truth Social launches service to give Wall Street traders an edge with real-time service
items.description: Trump Media launched an API to give paying customers real-time access to market-moving Truth Social posts.

items.title: Eli Lilly to buy psychedelics maker AtaiBeckley for $2.8 billion as experimental treatments gain traction
items.description: The deal for AtaiBeckley gives Lilly access to experimental drugs based on DMT and MDMA.

items.title: 'Not a junk rally:' How to trade the strongest small-cap stock market in three decades
items.description: The Russell 2000 small-cap stock index is up almost 20% this year, its best first half since 1991, and investing experts say the rally can keep running.

items.title: Ex-Fed advisor gets over three years in prison for lying about China ties
items.description: The case marks one of the most prominent U.S. prosecutions alleging Chinese intelligence targeting of U.S. institutions, as Trump intensifies its pursuit of foreign economic espionage.

items.title: Banking Committee's Sen. Rounds liked Warsh's 'tone' in first testimony as Fed chairman
items.description: Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh was on Capitol Hill for two days of testimony this week.

items.title: Analysis: Fed Chairman Warsh faces an inflation credibility test after Congress hearings
items.description: The new Fed chairman avoided major stumbles in two days of testimony before the House and Senate, but faces a rapid test of his commitment to price stability.

items.title: UnitedHealth blows past estimates, hikes earnings outlook as it reins in costs
items.description: The healthcare giant is working to stabilize margins by shrinking membership, exiting unprofitable contracts and pouring $1.5 billion into AI.

items.title: IRS chief Bisignano: 'We should have every family enrolled in a Trump Account'
items.description: "I think the objective is to have 70 million children under 18 to have a Trump Account," IRS CEO Frank Bigisnano said.

items.title: Nvidia-backed Fireworks hits $17.5 billion valuation as companies pursue cheaper AI models
items.description: Fireworks once relied heavily on revenue from coding startup Cursor, but has diversified in the past year as more companies reach for lower-cost AI models.

items.title: IRS tax liens can be a 'kiss of death,' consumer advocate says — and they're on the rise
items.description: Federal tax liens filed by the Internal Revenue Service can impact people's employment and their ability to access credit.

items.title: United earnings top estimates but airline expects $6 billion in added fuel costs
items.description: United reported higher revenue for premium, corporate and no-frills basic economy tickets and higher revenue for both domestic and international trips.
